description: peer-broadcast to two live peers in the same pair_key. Sender 'alpha' fans out to 'beta' and 'gamma'. No channel sockets, so every status is 'no-channel'. Recipients are ordered alphabetically (both by Go's sort.Slice and Python's natural insertion order — fixture pre_sql seeds in alpha order).
pre_sql: INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at, receive_mode) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'alpha', 'claude', 'peer', 'sk-alpha', 'test-room', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', 'interactive'); INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at, receive_mode) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'beta',  'claude', 'peer', 'sk-beta',  'test-room', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', 'interactive'); INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at, receive_mode) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'gamma', 'claude', 'peer', 'sk-gamma', 'test-room', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', 'interactive');
